---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new model, dataset, or improvement to the evaluation framework
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you would like to see added or changed.

## 💡 Motivation

Why would this be useful? How does it relate to code clone detection research?

## 🧠 Proposed Model / Dataset (if applicable)

- **Model name / HuggingFace Hub ID:** (e.g., `microsoft/unixcoder-base`)
- **Parameter count:**
- **Architecture type:** (Encoder-only / Encoder-Decoder / Decoder-only)
- **Dataset name / source:** (e.g., a new benchmark)

## 📎 Additional Context

Links, papers, or any other relevant information.
